variables.name: GOVERNANCE_ORDER_ENFORCEMENT
variables.truthy_means: Enforcement active — _decide outcomes can deny orders
variables.false_or_unset: Advisory only — check_new_order_allowed_full still logs but returns allowed for enforcement path

variables.name: GOVERNANCE_CAUTION_BLOCK_ENTRIES
variables.truthy_means: When joint live_mode is caution, deny

variables.name: GOVERNANCE_MISSING_JOINT_BLOCKS
variables.truthy_means: Deny when joint empty/missing (if enforcement on)

variables.name: GOVERNANCE_STALE_JOINT_BLOCKS
variables.truthy_means: Deny when joint older than GOVERNANCE_JOINT_STALE_HOURS
